title: Quantum Sphaera Companion: A Structure-First Mathematical Unfolding (v3.30.0)
description: Public audited release v3.30.0 of the Quantum Sphaera Companion. This version extends the post-v3.29.0 conservative upgrade-plus-probe integration line into a fuller certificate-aware continuation architecture, including probe-compatible upgrade packets, ranked work queues, executable conservative packets, compact readout/output/intake surfaces, OP-facing request/fulfillment/aggregation/dispatch/program/cycle/return logic, and a completed second downstream loop with explicit close/promote and branch-consumption structure. Matrix, crystal, field-profile, decoder, and Monte Carlo/probe layers are now coordinated under a route-faithful conservative discipline that preserves inherited certificates and the earliest honest boundary stop. The full historical witness remains preserved in Part II.
